# HealthGait

> Your gait tells a story. Apple Watch + Claude AI + physician attestation = clinical-grade gait analysis billable as RTM.

## What we do
HealthGait turns passive Apple Health data (walking speed, step length, walking asymmetry, double support time, cadence) into clinical-grade gait analysis. Claude AI detects gait deterioration weeks before a fall event. A physician attests via ClinicalSwipe. Result: billable RTM (98975-98981) from data the watch already collects. $94-170/mo per patient.

## Why gait matters
Walking speed is the "sixth vital sign." Predicts mortality better than blood pressure in 65+. A 0.1 m/s decline = 12% increased mortality risk. Yet <0.2% of eligible patients have RTM billing for gait.

## The pipeline
1. Apple Watch collects passively (no app needed)
2. HealthKit → Claude AI via MCP connector
3. Claude flags trends, generates clinical narrative
4. Physician attests via ClinicalSwipe
5. RTM 98975-98981: $94-170/mo per patient

## Ecosystem
- SurgeonValue: pre/post-op gait for CJR-X quality measures
- co-op.care: fall risk for aging families
- FallRisks: home safety + gait prediction

## Links
- Website: https://healthgait.com
- SurgeonValue: https://surgeonvalue.com
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care
- SolvingHealth: https://solvinghealth.com

## MCP connector
```json
"healthgait": {
  "command": "npx",
  "args": ["-y", "@anthropic-ai/mcp-remote", "https://solvinghealth.com/mcp"]
}
```
